response.overview: Alfie and Julie's love story has been one of music, laughter, and heartache. On one early morning in June, they must write their ending. Clive Owen is Alfie and Saskia Reeves is Julie in this touching and funny play on a life well lived. Following the critically acclaimed "Beginning" (2017) and "Middle" (2022), "End" is the final play in David Eldridge's trilogy exploring love and relationships. Lyric Hammersmith Theatre Artistic Director Rachel O'Riordan directs.
response.tagline: Every love story has a final chapter.
response.title: National Theatre at Home: End
